# Handelman certificate for M9 >= 0 on D = {t>0, 0<u<1, s>1}, s = sigma.
# Identity (eq. handelman in the paper):
#   (1+t)^8 * M9  =  sum_{k=0}^{3}  Bcoef[k](t,w) * B_{3,k}(u),   w = sigma - 1,
#   where B_{3,k}(u) = binom(3,k) u^k (1-u)^{3-k}  (>=0 on [0,1]).
# Each Bcoef[k](t,w) below has ONLY NONNEGATIVE integer/rational coefficients,
# so (1+t)^8 M9 >= 0 on D by inspection; since (1+t)^8>0, M9 >= 0 on D.
# Total nonnegative coefficients across the four Bcoef[k]: see count at end.

## Bcoef[0](t,w) = sum of coefficient * t^i * w^j  (461 terms)
2	t^0	w^0
35	t^1	w^0
19	t^1	w^1
318	t^2	w^0
320	t^2	w^1
84	t^2	w^2
1920	t^3	w^0

1506	t^3	w^2
